title: Opening for Software Engineer at PharmEasy

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at PharmEasy
jsonLd.description:
PharmEasy invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About PharmEasy:
PharmEasy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PharmEasy!
